productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Solid Red Jacket
description: Composition Red sleeveless jacket made of 100% polyester, has a mock collar, zippered front closure, appliqued branding on the left chest and two front pockets Fitting Regular Wash care Dry clean only This jacket from US Polo is inspired by classic sport style staples. The sleek finish offers extra insulation in the cold. Layer it over t-shirts, denims and suede shoes to beat the winter chill. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6'1" and shoulders 18.5"
